title: JSON OK Handler
description:
## JSON OK Handler

Export an Express-style request handler `okHandler(req, res)` that responds with status 200 and JSON body `{ ok: true }`.

Assume `res` exposes `status(code)` (chainable) and `json(payload)`.

title: Validate request body
description:
## Validate request body

Export a handler `createUser(req, res)` that:

- If `req.body.name` is missing or empty, respond with status `400` and body `{ error: 'name required' }`.
- Otherwise respond with status `201` and body `{ id: 1, name: req.body.name }`.

title: Simple Middleware
description:
## Simple Middleware

Export a middleware function `logger(req, res, next)` that simply calls the `next()` function to pass control to the next handler.

You do not need to log anything or modify the response.

title: Read Query Parameters
description:
## Read Query Parameters

Export a handler `greet(req, res)` that reads the `name` property from `req.query`.

- If `name` exists, respond with status 200 and JSON: `{ message: "Hello [name]" }`
- If `name` is missing, respond with status 200 and JSON: `{ message: "Hello Guest" }`

title: Read URL Parameters
description:
## Read URL Parameters

Export a handler `getUser(req, res)` that reads the `id` from `req.params`.

Respond with status 200 and JSON body `{ userId: id }`, where `id` is the exact value extracted from the parameters.

title: Authorization Check
description:
## Authorization Check

Export a middleware `checkAuth(req, res, next)` that examines `req.headers.authorization`.

- If the header is missing, respond with status `401` and JSON `{ error: "Unauthorized" }`.
- If the header exists, call `next()`.

title: Basic Error Handler
description:
## Basic Error Handler

Export an Express error-handling middleware function `errorHandler(err, req, res, next)`.

It should catch the error and respond with status `500` and JSON `{ error: err.message }`.

title: Not Found Handler
description:
## Not Found Handler

Export a handler `notFound(req, res)` that is used to catch undefined routes.

It must respond with status `404` and JSON `{ error: "Not Found" }`.

title: Redirect Handler
description:
## Redirect Handler

Export a handler `redirectHome(req, res)` that redirects the user to `/home`.

Assume `res` exposes `redirect(url)`.

title: Cache Control Header
description:
## Cache Control Header

Export a middleware `noCache(req, res, next)` that sets the `Cache-Control` header to `no-store` and then calls `next()`.

Assume `res` exposes `setHeader(key, value)`.

title: Ensure POST Method
description:
## Ensure POST Method

Export a middleware `requirePost(req, res, next)` that enforces the HTTP method.

- If `req.method` is strictly `'POST'`, call `next()`.
- Otherwise, respond with status `405` and JSON `{ error: "Method Not Allowed" }`.

title: Pagination Math
description:
## Pagination Math

Export a handler `paginate(req, res)` that reads `page` and `limit` from `req.query`.

- Parse them to integers. Default `page` to `1` and `limit` to `10` if they are missing.
- Calculate the `skip` value (`(page - 1) * limit`).
- Respond with JSON: `{ skip: calculatedSkip, limit: parsedLimit }`.

title: Send Plain Text
description:
## Send Plain Text

Export a handler `sendText(req, res)` that sends a plain text response instead of JSON.

Respond with status `200` and use `res.send('Hello World')`.

title: Extract Bearer Token
description:
## Extract Bearer Token

Export a middleware `extractToken(req, res, next)`.

- Read `req.headers.authorization`.
- If it exists and starts with `"Bearer "`, extract the token string after the space, assign it to `req.token`, and call `next()`.
- Otherwise, respond with status `401` and JSON `{ error: "Invalid format" }`.

title: Admin Role Guard
description:
## Admin Role Guard

Export a middleware `isAdmin(req, res, next)`.

- If `req.user` exists and `req.user.role` is exactly `'admin'`, call `next()`.
- Otherwise, respond with status `403` and JSON `{ error: "Forbidden" }`.

title: Session Cookie Guard
description:
## Session Cookie Guard

Export a middleware `requireSession(req, res, next)`.

- Check if `req.cookies` contains a `sessionId` property.
- If it exists, call `next()`.
- If missing (or if `req.cookies` is undefined), return status `401` and JSON `{ error: "No session" }`.

title: Request Timestamp
description:
## Request Timestamp

Export a middleware `addTimestamp(req, res, next)`.

It should attach the current time in milliseconds (using `Date.now()`) to the request object as `req.timestamp` and then call `next()`.

title: Smart Error Handler
description:
## Smart Error Handler

Export an error middleware `smartError(err, req, res, next)`.

- If `err.name` is exactly `'ValidationError'`, respond with status `400` and JSON `{ error: "Bad Request" }`.
- For all other errors, respond with status `500` and JSON `{ error: "Internal Server Error" }`.

title: Set CORS Header
description:
## Set CORS Header

Export a middleware `allowCors(req, res, next)`.

It must use `res.setHeader()` to set `'Access-Control-Allow-Origin'` to `'*'` and then call `next()`.

title: Count Body Keys
description:
## Count Body Keys

Export a middleware `countKeys(req, res, next)`.

- It must count the number of top-level keys in the `req.body` object.
- Assign this number to `req.bodyKeyCount`.
- Call `next()`.
- If `req.body` is undefined, default the count to `0`.
